Sponsorships / JerkyPro

JerkyPro

food
Affiliate
0%-10% Commission
affiliate
Apply Now → Visit Website

Overview

JerkyPro offers three types of sponsorships to top amateur or professional teams and players, along with streamers and YouTube personalities. Below you’ll find details on each type of sponsorship they offer.

JerkyPro reserves the right to discontinue any tier sponsorship at any time. When they sponsor teams/individuals they hold our sponsorees to a high standard. JerkyPro strongly feels that a sponsorship/affiliation of a team/individual reflects the standards of JerkyPro. When becoming a sponsoree, they monitor any and all social media content. JerkyPro will not tolerate pornography, racist, or sexist comments (to name a few) on social media posts/ tweets/videos/streams ect. You, the potential sponsoree is a direct representative of JerkyPro and will be held to that standard.

Premier Sponsorship

  • Premier Sponsorship’s are reserved for top amateur or professional teams/player along with aspiring YouTube/Streamer personalities.

  • Must have 20,000 or more legitimate social media followers (on any one platform on one account)

  • Proven achievements

  • Must have YouTube channel with a minimum of 2500+ legitimate followers/subs

  • Twitch, MLG or Kamcord (or similar) channel with a minimum of 2500+ legitimate followers/subs

  • Have an existing website and be willing to advertise the JerkyPro Logo that redirects to the JerkyPro homepage www.jerky.pro

  • Be enthusiastic with what you do!

  • Most importantly, LOVE JERKY Perks of a Premier Sponsorship

  • Discounts with the choice of either:10% personalized discount code for customer - no commission. Or 5% personalized discount code for customer AND 10% monetary commission on sales by use of code.

  • Initial sponsorship pack containing exclusive JerkyPro merchandise and jerky to keep or for yourself OR for social media giveaways to help grow your own page/stream/or channel.

  • Use of our name and logo on all of your social media and video channels, team jerseys, etc.

  • Placement of your team/individual  logo/image on the JerkyPro website

  • Potential funding for tournaments and events. This is determined on a case by case basis.

Platinum Sponsorship

  • Be an established team, organization or individual in your area of expertise

  • Must have 5,000 or more legitimate social media followers (on any one platform)

  • Must have YouTube channel with a minimum of 500+ legitimate followers/subs

  • Twitch, MLG or Kamcord channel with a minimum of 500+ legitimate followers/subs

  • Be enthusiastic with what you do

  • Most importantly, LOVE JERKY! Perks of a Platinum Sponsorship

  • Discounts with the choice of either:10% personalized discount code for customer - no commission. Or 5% personalized discount code for customer AND 10% monetary commission on sales by use of code.

  • Use of our name and logo on all of your social media and video channels, team jerseys, etc.

  • Placement of your team/individual  logo/image on the JerkyPro website

  • Opportunity to advance to Premier Sponsorship status once your sponsorship code has been used a minimum of 50 times total (individual purchases).

Gold Sponsorship

  • Be an up and coming  player, driver, fighter, team or organization

  • Less than 5,000 social media followers (on any one platform)

  • Be enthusiastic with what you do

  • Most importantly, LOVE JERKY! Perks of a Gold Sponsorship

  • 5% discount code given for use of anything on the JerkyPro website.

  • Use of our name and logo on all of your social media and video channels, team jerseys, etc.

  • Placement of your team/individual  logo/image on the JerkyPro website

  • Opportunity to advance to Platinum Sponsorship status once your sponsorship code has been used a minimum of 25 times (individual purchases).
